summary: Iteration 14 testing complete: All requested features verified working - Hamburger menu navigation, Donations page (PayPal/IBAN), Profile logout/delete buttons, and Quiz Isaia translations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 14 features verified. Hamburger menu (☰) works and shows Home, Bibbia, Diario, Profilo, Donazioni. Donations page shows PayPal (andrehangar@live.it) and full IBAN (IT46 I036 6901 6008 5802 8558 932) with BIC/SWIFT. Profile page has working Disconnetti and Elimina Account buttons in Account section.

hamburger_menu_opens.details: Click on ☰ icon in top-right opens menu overlay

menu_items_present.details: Menu shows: Home (with icon), Bibbia, Diario, Profilo, Donazioni

menu_navigation_home.details: Clicking Home navigates to home/tabs screen

donations_bonifico_iban.details: Bonifico Bancario shows full IBAN: IT46 I036 6901 6008 5802 8558 932

donations_bank_details.details: Shows Intestatario: Andrea Confortino, Banca: Revolut Bank UAB, BIC/SWIFT: REVOITM2, Indirizzo: Via Dante 7, 20123, Milano (MI), Italy

profile_logout_button.details: Disconnetti button visible in Account section with red exit icon

profile_delete_account_button.details: Elimina Account button visible in Account section with trash icon

logout_confirmation_dialog.details: Clicking Disconnetti triggers window.confirm dialog on web (showConfirm helper used cross-platform)

quiz_isaia_no_broken_questions.details: No 'Isaia - Proto?' broken format found. Questions properly formatted like 'Quali capitoli formano il Proto-Isaia?'

quiz_proto_deutero_trito_questions.details: All three division questions found: Proto-Isaia (1-39), Deutero-Isaia (40-55), Trito-Isaia (56-66)

api_test_results.GET /api/donations/config: 200 - Returns paypal_email, iban, bic_swift, banca, intestatario
api_test_results.GET /api/quiz/categories: 200 - Returns list of 33 categories including Isaia
